identity.canonical_title: Extended Helicity Functional and Topological Protection

theory.canonical_statement: The total helicity in a rotating frame with Kaluza--Klein contributions is
theory.technical_interpretation: The total helicity in a rotating frame with Kaluza--Klein contributions is \[ H_{\mathrm{total}}(t) = \int_{V} A\cdot B\, d^{3}x - \frac{\omega_{\mathrm{gyro}}}{c^{2}} \int_{V} r\times(E\times B)\, d^{3}x + \sum_{m\geq 1}\frac{m}{R_{\mathrm{KK}}}H^{\mathrm{KK}}_{m}. \] Under ideal magnetohydrodynamic evolution coupled to Kaluza--Klein modes, \[ \frac{dH_{\mathrm{total}}}{dt}=0. \]

latex_blocks: H_{\mathrm{total}}(t) = \int_{V} A\cdot B\, d^{3}x - \frac{\omega_{\mathrm{gyro}}}{c^{2}} \int_{V} r\times(E\times B)\, d^{3}x + \sum_{m\geq 1}\frac{m}{R_{\mathrm{KK}}}H^{\mathrm{KK}}_{m}.
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[ H_{\mathrm{total}}(t) = \int_{V} A\cdot B\, d^{3}x - \frac{\omega_{\mathrm{gyro}}}{c^{2}} \int_{V} r\times(E\times B)\, d^{3}x + \sum_{m\geq 1}\frac{m}{R_{\mathrm{KK}}}H^{\mathrm{KK}}_{m}. \] Under ideal magnetohydrodynamic evolution coupled to Kaluza--Klein modes, \[ \frac{dH_{\mathrm{total}}}{dt}=0. \]

\[
hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{tunnel}} = \hbar \omega_0 \hat{a}^\dagger \hat{a} + \frac{\hbar^2}{2m_{\text{eff}}} (\partial_d)^2 + V[d] + g_{\text{tunnel}} (\hat{a}^\dagger + \hat{a})(\partial_d + \partial_d^\dagger)
\]
\[
A_{\text{tunnel}} \propto \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} A_n \exp\left(-\frac{n}{\hbar} \int_{d_{\min}}^{d_{\text{bolt}}} \sqrt{2m_{\text{eff}} V[d]} \, dd\right)
\]

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This fixes the total rotating-frame helicity functional with the Kaluza--Klein correction sectors included.
This isolates the KK-mode contribution that augments the classical helicity carrier.
This closes the entry by stating the conserved total helicity law under the admissible evolution.
